title: Global Bank Digital Transformation
description: End-to-end digital transformation for a Tier 1 global bank, modernizing core banking platforms and customer experiences across 40+ markets.
challenge: Legacy core banking system serving 15M+ customers across 40 markets was limiting product innovation, increasing compliance risk, and degrading customer experience with 3+ second transaction times.
approach: Phased migration to cloud-native microservices architecture. API-first design enabling real-time integration. New digital banking platform with AI-powered personalization. Agile delivery across 12 parallel workstreams.
outcome: Successfully migrated 15M+ customer accounts with zero downtime. New platform processes 10× more transactions per second. Mobile banking app rated 4.8/5 across markets.

title: Smart City Infrastructure Program
description: Designing and implementing an integrated IoT and data analytics platform for a $2B smart city development across urban mobility, energy, and public services.
challenge: A major Middle Eastern city needed to integrate disparate urban systems — transportation, utilities, emergency services — into a unified intelligent platform serving 2M+ residents.
approach: Designed and deployed a cloud-native urban data platform integrating 50,000+ IoT sensors. Real-time analytics dashboard for city operators. AI-powered predictive models for traffic, energy, and public safety.
outcome: Platform now processes 1M+ data points daily. Reduced traffic congestion by 22%. Energy efficiency improved by 30%. Emergency response times cut by 40%.

title: Luxury Retail Omnichannel Platform
description: Unified commerce platform for a global luxury retail group, connecting 300+ boutiques with digital channels for seamless customer experiences.
challenge: Disconnected retail channels with separate inventory systems, inconsistent customer data, and no unified view of the customer journey across physical boutiques and digital touchpoints.
approach: Built a composable commerce platform with real-time inventory sync, unified CDP, AI-powered clienteling tools, and immersive digital experiences that mirror the in-boutique luxury feel.
outcome: Digital revenue grew 180% in first year. Customer lifetime value increased 45%. In-store conversion improved 28% with clienteling tools. Inventory accuracy reached 99.7%.

title: Healthcare AI & Analytics Platform
description: AI-powered clinical decision support and operational analytics platform for a national healthcare network spanning 120+ hospitals and 50,000+ clinicians.
challenge: Fragmented patient data across 120 hospitals, lack of predictive capabilities for patient outcomes, and operational inefficiencies costing $200M+ annually in waste.
approach: Unified health data platform with FHIR-compliant architecture. AI models for clinical decision support, readmission prediction, and resource optimization. Real-time operational dashboards for hospital administrators.
outcome: Unified 40M+ patient records. Readmission rates reduced by 18%. Clinical decision accuracy improved 32%. $85M annual savings from operational optimization.
